biography:
Raphael Pichey Gavron (born 24 June 1989) is a British actor. He had supporting roles in the films Breaking  (2006), Nick & Norah's Infinite Playlist (2008), A Star Is Born (2018), and the series Life Unexpected (2010) and Godfather of Harlem (2019).
